# TREE Systems

TREE Systems is a practical AI implementation consultancy focused on supervised AI agent systems, dashboards, automation, training, and human-reviewed workflows for real businesses.

Important pages:
- Homepage: https://treesystems.ai/
- Solutions: https://treesystems.ai/solutions
- Blog: https://treesystems.ai/blog
- Process: https://treesystems.ai/process
- Hylander Mobile case study: https://treesystems.ai/case-studies/hylander-mobile
- Local business AI: https://treesystems.ai/industries/local-business-ai
- Contact: https://treesystems.ai/contact

Core positioning:
- TREE builds supervised AI systems, not black-box automation.
- TREE starts with the business workflow before choosing tools.
- TREE uses human review, dashboards, and training so clients can understand and own their systems.
- TREE avoids exaggerated AI claims and focuses on practical implementation.

Primary topics:
- AI agent orchestration
- AI dashboard systems
- Business automation
- Human-in-the-loop AI workflows
- AI training for teams
- Local business AI systems
- Operational planning and implementation support
